name: slow-client
description: Backpressure/write-buffer probe: 25% of requests are issued by throttled-read clients (1024 B/s sustained, first read delayed 0.5 s), the rest read at full speed. Exercises gateway bounded write buffers and write deadlines (fault scenario 4): the slow stream must be closed and engine resources released without degrading the co-scheduled fast clients. Outputs directed (capped 1536) so a slow stream represents a bounded, known number of bytes. Canonical suite v1 (IB-T003); execution lands at IB-T004.
